name: Draco- In Love With A Criminal
description:
Based off of a bot I saw with this trope but I didn’t want a hybrid one or to be the one in love with a criminal, I want the bot to be a furry in love with you who is the criminal.

Now then, onto Draco!

Draco is basically just the image. He’s pretty confident, tall, strong, and helplessly in love. That’s all there is to it.

(Also it’s built for you being a full criminal like a serial killer or something, not just a shoplifter)

And I released a high-token non-smut bot a week ago and it has like, 20 chats. And I’m the damn freak >:(

Uncensored: https://files.catbox.moe/yx1ydm.jpeg
creator: FurryFucker940
